svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="nginx坑" id="nginxtt"> <mxGraphModel dx="-514" dy="-131" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="980" pageHeight="520" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=14;fontStyle=1;" value="nginx root 坑：scp -r dist 为什么部署不生效" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="28" width="500" x="240" y="20" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="wrongTitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#dc2626;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="❌ 错误写法" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="380" x="70" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nginxBad" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef2f2;strokeColor=#dc2626;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="nginx root = /www/.../operation-backend/" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="380" x="70" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="distBad" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=20;" value="dist/
├─ index.html
├─ assets/
│ └─ app.js" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="380" x="70" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="noteBad" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fef3c7;strokeColor=#d97706;fontColor=#92400e;fontSize=11;" value="scp -r dist → 文件落在 .../operation-backend/dist/
nginx 读根目录，不读 dist 子目录
部署不生效，线上还是旧版本" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="380" x="70" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="rightTitle" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;fontColor=#16a34a;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;" value="✓ 正确写法" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="24" width="380" x="530" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="nginxBood" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=12;fontStyle=1;" value="nginx root = /www/.../operation-backend/" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="380" x="530" y="110" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="flatGood" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffffff;strokeColor=#94a3b8;fontColor=#1e293b;fontSize=11;align=left;spacingLeft=20;" value="operation-backend/
├─ index.html ← tar 解压到根目录
├─ assets/
│ └─ app.js" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="380" x="530" y="170" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="noteGood" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dcfce7;strokeColor=#16a34a;fontColor=#166534;fontSize=11;" value="rm -rf assets index.html → tar xzf 到根目录
nginx 直接读根目录新文件
部署生效，清掉 ._ Apple 元数据" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="380" x="530" y="270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="cmd" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#1e293b;strokeColor=#1e293b;fontColor=#e2e8f0;fontSize=11;fontFamily=Courier New;" value="ssh ... "cd /www/.../operation-backend && rm -rf assets index.html && tar xzf /tmp/op-dist.tar.gz"" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="36" width="740" x="120" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 7px; margin-left: 420px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #1e293b;
display: inline-block; font-size: 14px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#1e293b, #c3ccdc); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: nginx root 坑：scp -r dist 为什么部署不生效

div.div:
scp -r dist → 文件落在 .../operation-backend/dist/
nginx 读根目录，不读 dist 子目录
部署不生效，线上还是旧版本

├─ index.html ← tar 解压到根目录
├─ assets/
│ └─ app.js

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 378px; height: 1px; padding-top: 280px; margin-left: 461px;

div.div:
rm -rf assets index.html → tar xzf 到根目录
nginx 直接读根目录新文件
部署生效，清掉 ._ Apple 元数据
